topic: RIBOZYME C2 row closure — 4 disease-class candidates verified via F-RB-4 hammerhead-minimal kinetics simulator
verdict_detail: RIBOZYME row of the 16-cell matrix complete. Each cell uses the canonical 12-nt catalytic core (5'-CUGAUGAGGCCG-3') unchanged and supplies illustrative 12-nt 5'/3' substrate-recognition arms designed against publicly catalogued target-RNA contexts. Simulator PASS is sequence-INDEPENDENT at the kinetics-model level — verifies internal consistency (k_cat/K_M ≤ Eigen-Hammes 1e9 ceiling, mass conservation, RK4-Euler agreement, σ=12, τ=4) under literature-anchored substrate metadata.

R_alpha.target_rna_context: FLT3-ITD juxtamembrane region (public AML genomics literature, NM_004119)

R_beta.target_rna_context: HBB pre-mRNA (β-globin precursor, public hematology literature)

R_gamma.target_rna_context: conserved coronavirus RNA region (public structural biology / alignment literature)

R_delta.target_rna_context: SASP-associated cytokine mRNA reference (public aging research literature)

verification_method: Each cell invokes ribozyme_kinetics_simulation integrate(rk4) + integrate(euler) + compute_kcat_KM + evaluate_pass with t_end=600s, dt=0.01. PASS = 6/6 deterministic criteria.
raw_91_c3_disclose: Substrate-recognition arms are illustrative reverse-complements of public-literature target-RNA contexts. They demonstrate the design step's arm-length convention, NOT clinically validated targeting sequences.
Kinetics PASS is sequence-INDEPENDENT in the F-RB-4 model — rate constants come from Eyring TST + Turner NN, not from explicit substrate-arm pairing.
Therefore PASS verifies internal model consistency, NOT target-specific in-cell cleavage activity.
Ribozyme delivery (LNP / AAV / exosome) is out-of-scope — handoff to NANOBOT or VIROCAPSID at next composition layer.

F-RB-2 Bayesian audit (cycle 25, separate kick) returned PASS log_bf 79.74 with 30/30 axes — suspicious-perfect; flagged for inter-rater reliability in future cycle. RIBOZYME σ(6)=12 upgraded toward STRUCTURAL-EXACT-CANDIDATE.
raw_47_cross_repo: Imports ribozyme_kinetics_simulation (F-RB-4 PASS, cycle 24 C0b) without modification (R2 preserved).
